MetAlbaz.NAME: Branded Opening
DESCRIPTIONS: You find a lookout point in the Spire. A white dragon surrounded by #yGolden #yFlames flies across the horizon. NL The golden flames cover the watchtower, and rumbling thunder erupts from afar, as if heaven and earth are shaking. NL However, you feel a reassuring power from the flames around it. NL You take a brief #grest bathed in the golden flames, and you feel a vague #rurge to play cards. NL (Act 4 difficulty, please choose carefully whether to challenge it.)

The dragon flaps its massive wings, drawing gorgeous arcs high in the sky. NL Intense light flashes from its scales, and eventually, it transforms into a young boy, landing leisurely on the watchtower.
You rest for a moment in the golden flames, then quietly part ways with this unexpected guest.

ComicHail.NAME: Comic Store
DESCRIPTIONS: You push through tough thorns and find a building standing next to a cold stone wall. Through the bright glass doors, under snow-white lights, bookshelves and a counter are neatly arranged. The display window next to it holds many dolls and posters. A red-haired boy stands at the entrance, seemingly muttering something to himself.

You walk into the store, greeted by bookshelves filled with many comics, alongside a few claw machines and gacha machines. It really is a comic bookstore. There aren't many customers. Seeing you enter, the red-haired boy follows you inside, gives a simple 'welcome', and continues muttering: "#yI'm #ystill #ymissing #ythose #yfew #ykey #ycards, #ywhere #ycan #yI #yfind #ythem..."
How could there be such a place in the corruption-spreading Spire? You leave cautiously.
This completely different form of expression compared to the boring magic books in La Maison feels novel to you. You casually flip through the comics here and continue exploring upwards.

The young owner grabs your hand in pleasant surprise: "#yAre #yyou #yreally #ywilling #yto #yhelp #yme? #yIf #yyou #ycan #yfind #ythe #ycards #yI #ywant, #ypick #yanything #yyou #ylike #yfrom #ythis #ystore!" Feeling a bit awkward, you nod and quickly leave the bookstore. "#yWe'll #ykeep #yin #ytouch #ythrough #ythis #yrelic!" the boss shouts from behind.
OPTIONS: Do you want to learn some moves from the comics?
What came out of the gacha machine?

FlyingCat.NAME: Winged Cat
DESCRIPTIONS:
Passing through a strange rift, you arrive on a bridge you have never seen before. A headless corpse lies across the bridge, along with a half-lit cigar... and a super cool coat and bullets!
Hannina looks at you with stars in her eyes, asking for your opinion.
The cat is very happy and eager to try it out. You head back the way you came to the main path.
For various possible reasons, you refuse. To comfort her fake crying, you give her quite a bit of white gold to satisfy her, after which you head back the way you came to the main path.
OPTIONS: Help her make a matching coat and cigar, and pick up the bullets. (Replace your starting deck and obtain two special Relics)
